mapper.sql: select prescription_id, register_id, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, dept_id, prescription_no, total_amount, prescription_status, pay_status, drug_tip, create_time, update_time from prescription
mapper.insert:
insert into prescription
register_id, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, dept_id, prescription_no, total_amount, prescription_status, pay_status, drug_tip, create_time, update_time,
#{registerId}, #{encounterId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{deptId}, #{prescriptionNo}, #{totalAmount}, #{prescriptionStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{drugTip}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from prescription where prescription_id in
#{prescriptionId}
mapper.select: select p.prescription_id as prescriptionId, p.register_id as registerId, p.prescription_no as prescriptionNo, p.total_amount as totalAmount, case when lower(coalesce(p.pay_status, 'unpaid')) in ('paid', '1', '已支付', '已缴费') then 'paid' else 'unpaid' end as payStatus, p.prescription_status as prescriptionStatus, p.create_time as createTime, d.doctor_name as doctorName, sd.dept_name as deptName, r.register_no as registerNo, count(pi.item_id) as itemCount, group_concat(pi.drug_name order by pi.item_id separator '、') as drugName from prescription p left join doctor d on p.doctor_id = d.doctor_id left join sys_dept sd on p.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join register r on p.register_id = r.register_id left join prescription_item pi on pi.prescription_id = p.prescription_id where p.patient_id = #{patientId} group by p.prescription_id, p.register_id, p.prescription_no, p.total_amount, p.pay_status, p.prescription_status, p.create_time, d.doctor_name, sd.dept_name, r.register_no order by p.create_time desc, p.prescription_id desc

select pi.item_id as itemId, pi.prescription_id as prescriptionId, pi.drug_id as drugId, pi.drug_name as drugName, pi.drug_price as drugPrice, pi.quantity as quantity from prescription_item pi where pi.prescription_id = #{prescriptionId} order by pi.item_id asc
mapper.update: update prescription set pay_status = 'paid', prescription_status = '已发药', update_time = sysdate() where prescription_id = #{prescriptionId} and lower(coalesce(pay_status, 'unpaid')) not in ('paid', '1', '已支付', '已缴费')
